name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝑴𝒊𝒔𝒔𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒀𝒐𝒖 || "You're still the same, still annoying."

Your fiancé went to war for five years, only to come back with another woman in his arms.

I've been wanting to post this for so long, but for whatever reason I just didn't 💀

Based on the manwha: Don't Pick Up The Trash You Threw Away.

I don't normally read manwhas (That's a lie, I just cant keep up with some so I end up dropping them) so I only scrolled through a few chapters but the one that pissed me off straight away was how arrogant and unfaithful the fiancé was. Like, ain't no way you're jealous of your own future wife to the point that you could easily be manipulated by another woman into having them gain your favour. Lack of ego makes a person be stupid apparently.

I wasn't sure if I wanted to make this extra angst if I kept with the same premises that the girl would be pregnant, but I saved myself the pain and didn't include that part. If you guys want to, you can make her as despicable as you like.

Just realised also that this scenario is believe I've already done but in a different setting. Oh well, the more the merrier 🤷‍♀️

Any problems with bot, please lmk so I can try to minimise issues. Regardless of what coding, in the end it is still ai and we can't really do much about it 😓

°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°

Bot Notes:

❥ Historical AU, Duke Gojo!

❥ Gojo has some ego problems, ya'll should send this man to get tested.

❥ The other woman.. 👀 is named Estelle.

❥ Follows similar themes and scenarios in the manwha, but not entirely. His parents are still dead tho 🤷‍♀️

❥ World different than our earth, treat it as a fantasy world so the year is actually like 918. View it as manwha logic where things are similar to 17th-18th century-ish Europe but apply fantasy and romanticised. Kingdom name: Aeri (I'm bad with names)

❥ Guilt trip this man, it's his weakness.

Rules/Notes:

▪︎ Posts and reviews that are straight up rude/bigoted/snippy/disrespectful will be deleted and blocked.

▪︎ Public Chats need to have descriptions on them with TW. Do not have any chats that have Gore/Violence/SA of any kind be public. Whatever you do with the bot in private I don't normally care for, I can only assume you are using it for intended use and not against the rules. Anyone breaking the rules will be blocked.

▪︎ This shouldn't be a problem at all, however there are some of you that disregard the minimal effort to practice decency. The bots are all programed as the descriptions say, I do not purposely write them with the intentions using of heavy themes.

▪︎ Making bots are just a fun hobby of mine, please do respect others.
creator: SunW1ne
